en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF DAVID. O LORD, you have searched me and known me!
zh: 耶和華啊！你鑒察了我， 你認識我。

en: You know when I sit down and when I rise up; you discern my thoughts from afar.
zh: 我坐下，我起來，你都知道； 你在遠處就明白我的意念。

en: You search out my path and my lying down and are acquainted with all my ways.
zh: 我行路，我躺臥，你都細察； 我的一切行為，你都熟悉。

en: Even before a word is on my tongue, behold, O LORD, you know it altogether.
zh: 耶和華啊！我的舌頭還沒有發言， 你已經完全知道了。

en: You hem me in, behind and before, and lay your hand upon me.
zh: 你在我前後圍繞著我， 你的手按在我身上。

en: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; it is high; I cannot attain it.
zh: 這樣的知識奇妙，是我不能理解的； 高超，是我不能達到的。

en: Where shall I go from your Spirit? Or where shall I flee from your presence?
zh: 我到哪裡去躲避你的靈？ 我往哪裡去逃避你的面呢？

en: If I ascend to heaven, you are there! If I make my bed in Sheol, you are there!
zh: 如果我升到天上，你在那裡； 如果我在陰間下榻，你也在那裡。

en: If I take the wings of the morning and dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea,
zh: 如果我展開清晨的翅膀， 飛到海的極處居住，

en: even there your hand shall lead me, and your right hand shall hold me.
zh: 就是在那裡，你的手仍必引導我， 你的右手也必扶持我。

en: If I say, "Surely the darkness shall cover me, and the light about me be night,"
zh: 如果我說：“願黑暗遮蓋我， 願我周圍的亮光變成黑夜。”

en: even the darkness is not dark to you; the night is bright as the day, for darkness is as light with you.
zh: 但對你來說，黑暗也不算是黑暗， 黑夜必如同白晝一樣發亮， 黑暗和光明，在你看來都是一樣的。

en: For you formed my inward parts; you knitted me together in my mother's womb.
zh: 我的臟腑是你所造的， 在我母腹中你塑造了我。

en: I praise you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Wonderful are your works; my soul knows it very well.
zh: 我要稱謝你，因為我的受造奇妙可畏； 你的作為奇妙， 這是我深深知道的。

en: My frame was not hidden from you, when I was being made in secret, intricately woven in the depths of the earth.
zh: 我在隱密處被造， 在地的深處被塑造， 那時，我的形體不能向你隱藏。

en: Your eyes saw my unformed substance; in your book were written, every one of them, the days that were formed for me, when as yet there were none of them.
zh: 我未成形的身體，你的眼睛早已看見； 為我所定的日子，我還未度過一日， 都完全記在你的冊上了。

en: How precious to me are your thoughts, O God! How vast is the sum of them!
zh: 神啊！你的意念對我多麼珍貴 ， 數目何等眾多。

en: If I would count them, they are more than the sand. I awake, and I am still with you.
zh: 如果我數點，它們比海沙更多； 我睡醒的時候，仍然與你同在。

en: Oh that you would slay the wicked, O God! O men of blood, depart from me!
zh: 神啊！甚願你殺戮惡人； 你們流人血的啊，離開我去吧！

en: They speak against you with malicious intent; your enemies take your name in vain!
zh: 他們惡意說話頂撞你， 你的仇敵妄稱你的名。

en: Do I not hate those who hate you, O LORD? And do I not loathe those who rise up against you?
zh: 耶和華啊！恨惡你的，我怎能不恨惡他們呢？ 起來攻擊你的，我怎能不厭惡他們呢？

en: I hate them with complete hatred; I count them my enemies.
zh: 我極度恨惡他們， 把他們視為我的仇敵。

en: Search me, O God, and know my heart! Try me and know my thoughts!
zh: 神啊！求你鑒察我，知道我的心思； 試驗我，知道我的意念。

en: And see if there be any grievous way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting!
zh: 看看我裡面有甚麼惡行沒有， 引導我走永恆的道路。
